title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Intel24 Limited
body: "Application number 5342  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by Intel24 Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 22 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Intel24 Limited is changed to 16079185, Ltd. "
